subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Lord, my Support, my Beloved and my Heart's Desire! My tongue, both outward and inward, beareth witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا الهی و سیدی و سندی و محبوبی و مقصودی یشهد لسان ظاهری و باطنی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
